titles.title: Arise Thou MIghty Man of Valour

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Arise thou mighty man of valour and brave the fight, Victory is in thy favour go in this thy might, The Midianites are running, It’s spiritual Armageddon; Shout, “the Sword of the Lord and of Gideon! ” Yes, the Spirit of Gideon is on me, Yes, the Spirit of the Lord is anointing me.

verse.name: v2
v3
v4
verse.lines: “You have followed me this far, What can I do for you? ” “Let a double portion of Your spirit rest upon me too. ” “You ask a hard thing but if you see me go, The power of the Lord you shall know. ” For the Spirit of Elisha is on me, Yes, the Spirit of the Lord is anointing me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Arise, you moping eagles, Cease hopping on the ground, Can’t you hear your brother screaming? There’s virtue in that sound. Arise and eat, be strengthened, For this journey you must be strong, You were born to set your eyes on the Sun. For the Spirit of the Eagle is on me, Yes, the Spirit of the Lord is anointing me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Arise, thou mighty men of valour and brave the fight, Victory is in thy favour go in this thy might; The Midianites are running, it’s spiritual Armageddon, Shout the Sword of the Lord and of Gideon. }8x
